title: Hiro's Animal Cookie Friends
synopsis: Little Hiro discovers magical animal-shaped cookies that come to life in his kitchen, leading to a delightful adventure of friendship and yummy treats.

pages.text: Hiro loves cookies! Today, Mama makes special animal cookies.

illustration.description: A toddler boy with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face sitting at a colorful kitchen table watching his mother roll out cookie dough. Steam rises from freshly baked golden animal-shaped cookies on cooling racks. Sparkles dance around the delicious treats with exaggerated proportions.
illustration.alt: Hiro watching his mother make animal cookies in a magical kitchen

pages.text: Look! A bunny cookie hops! A cat cookie purrs! A duck cookie quacks!

illustration.description: A boy with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face clapping his hands in delight as golden animal cookies magically come to life around him. A bunny cookie hops with sparkles, a cat cookie stretches with steam wisps, and a duck cookie waddles with magical drips of frosting.
illustration.alt: Hiro watching animal cookies come to life

pages.text: The cookies dance and play. Hiro giggles and claps. Time for a yummy snack!

illustration.description: A toddler with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face surrounded by dancing animal cookies in a feast celebration scene. The cookies have exaggerated proportions with steam, drips, and sparkles creating a magical food wonderland. Hiro reaches for a cookie with pure food joy.
illustration.alt: Hiro enjoying a magical cookie party

metadata.illustrationStyle: delicious appetizing food, exaggerated proportions, steam drips sparkles, magical food, diverse cuisines, feast celebration, cooking scenes, yummy visual, food joy

questions.question: What shape are Mama's special cookies?
questions.explanation: Mama makes special animal-shaped cookies that look like bunnies, cats, and ducks!

questions.question: What does the bunny cookie do?
questions.explanation: The bunny cookie hops around magically while the other cookies move too!

questions.question: How does Hiro feel about the cookies?
questions.explanation: Hiro giggles and claps because he's so happy to see the magical cookies!
